steps: This request is beyond the scope of the level 1 character builder, which only supports level 1 characters in D&D 2024.
If you want to build a level 1 Ranger, use dnd-build to create the character first.
For level 5 Ranger optimization or Beast Master subclass mechanics, that level of play is not covered in the current system.
Recommendation: Start with a level 1 Ranger build first.
